「这一次，我要改写华夏的末日剧本！」
拥有超忆症的徐晓从末日的烈焰中重生，睁眼竟是灾变前213天。
上一世，他亲眼见证人类被丧尸啃噬、巨人践踏、巨兽撕裂、虫群吞噬，；这一世，他带着刻入骨髓的记忆重生归来
他用超忆症复刻末日时间线：
「半年后，地球将沦为异界屠宰场！丧尸只是开胃菜，50米高的装甲巨人能生吞坦克，虫群过境连骨头渣都不剩！」
当国际嘲讽「华夏举国备战是集体癔症」，徐晓已启动【长城计划】：
用2000座钢铁堡垒浇筑「长城防线」，核电站成充电宝；
工业大摸底，最强工业克苏鲁开始了他的表演。
当灾变开始发生的时候，想要一张堡垒的入场券？抱歉，请拿出足够的资源和技术交换。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/e7928f975253e940ef8cb340fdcef367","author":"老李的盒子炮","author_id":"","book_id":"7505718751845682201","book_name":"虫群灭世？重生上交华夏堡垒计划","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#181810","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":8,"name":"科幻末世","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=8&name=科幻末世&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":36,"name":"重生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=36&name=重生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":68,"name":"末世","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=68&name=末世&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":379,"name":"求生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=379&name=求生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":828,"name":"基建","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=828&name=基建&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":841,"name":"群像","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=841&name=群像&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7505718783030329881","read_count":"688","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"239415"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"6.9","serial_count":"118","tags":"科幻末世,重生,末世,求生,基建,群像","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/c6fb669425a0bb804a6448e9319314f1~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779335075&x-signature=P5fihjOY6cBWWTbrPfqVrEjVToE%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2533706504345021","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"85"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032211443533F7C1CEEC5A38993F19"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读9小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":2,"forwarded_count"
